name: Stretch Armstrong & the Flex Fighters
overview: When overscheduled teenager Jake Armstrong and his two best friends are accidentally exposed to an experimental chemical, they become Stretch Armstrong and the Flex Fighters, a team of unlikely superheroes who expand beyond the confines of their lives and embark on a series of adventures.

trailers.title: Stretch Armstrong & the Flex Fighters - ‘Heroes Gone Rogue’ Season 2 Official Preview
